44.reason: [This loop condition is incorrect: it stops only at space, but numbers may be followed directly by operators or '=' without space. Also, it may read past the end of input or into non-digit characters, causing incorrect parsing.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This loop condition is incorrect: it stops only at space, but numbers may be followed directly by operators or '=' without space. Also, it may read past the end of input or into non-digit characters, causing incorrect parsing.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This loop condition is incorrect: it stops only at space, but numbers may be followed by operators or '=' without space. Also, it doesn't check for EOF or end of number properly, leading to reading beyond valid digits.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [This loop condition is incorrect: it stops only at space, but numbers may be followed by operators or '=' without a space. Also, it doesn't check for EOF or end of number properly, leading to reading beyond valid digits and possibly undefined behavior.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [This loop condition is incorrect: it stops only at space, but numbers may be followed by operators or '=' without space. Also, it doesn't check for EOF or end of number properly, leading to reading beyond valid digits and possibly undefined behavior.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [This loop condition assumes space terminates number, but input may end with '=' or newline; also fails to check for EOF or operator characters like '+'/'-' which can follow immediately without space]

65.reason: [Same error as above: incorrect loop condition for reading multi-digit numbers after division operator. Should check isdigit(next), not just space.]
